query:
You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.49 (commit: 07297749).

## Issue to Resolve

Wrap annotations before class constructor (ktlint_official)
Annotations before the class constructor should be wrapped in same way as other annotations when code style `ktlint_official` is used.

Example:
```
data class Foo @Bar1 @Bar2("bar") @Bar3 @Bar4 constructor(private val foobar: Int) {
    fun foo(): String = "foo"
}
```
should be formatted as
```
data class Foo
    @Bar1
    @Bar2("bar")
    @Bar3
    @Bar4
    constructor(private val foobar: Int) {
    fun foo(): String = "foo"
}
```
Annotations on type projections should be wrapped in same way as other annotations
Given a type argument list in which one or more of the type projects are annotation than the same wrapping rules should be applies as with other annotations.

Exampe:
```
val fooBar: FooBar<String, @Foo String, @Foo @Bar String, @Bar("bar") @Foo String> = FooBar()
```
should be formatted as:
```
val fooBar: FooBar<
    String,
    @Foo String,
    @Foo @Bar
    String,
    @Bar("bar")
    @Foo
    String
    > = FooBar()
```

In case the type argument list only contains type projections without or with a single annotation without parameter than the annotation does not need to be wrapped. So code below will not be changed:
```
val foo1: List<@Foo String> = emptyList()
val foo2 = emptyList<@Foo String>()
val foo3: Map<@Foo String, @Foo String> = emptyMap()
val foo4 = emptyMap<@Foo String, @Foo String>()
```

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-cli/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/cli/api/Baseline.kt`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/AnnotationRule.kt`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/IndentationRule.kt`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/TypeArgumentListSpacingRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

conversation_history.name: read
conversation_history.content:
1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.KtLintAssertThat.Companion.assertThatRule
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.LintViolation
  5→import org.junit.jupiter.api.Nested
  6→import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test
  7→
  8→class AnnotationRuleTest {
  9→    private val annotationRuleAssertThat = assertThatRule { AnnotationRule() }
 10→
 11→    @Test
 12→    fun `Given a single annotation on same line before the annotated construct`() {
 13→        val code =
 14→            """
 15→            @FunctionalInterface class FooBar {
 16→                @JvmField var foo: String
 17→                @Test fun bar() {}
 18→            }
 19→            """.trimIndent()
 20→        annotationRuleAssertThat(code).hasNoLintViolations()
 21→    }
 22→
 23→    @Test
 24→    fun `Given a single annotation on line above the annotated construct`() {
 25→        val code =
 26→            """
 27→            @FunctionalInterface
 28→            class FooBar {
 29→                @JvmField
 30→                var foo: String
 31→                @Test
 32→                fun bar() {}
 33→            }
 34→            """.trimIndent()
 35→        annotationRuleAssertThat(code).hasNoLintViolations()
 36→    }
 37→
 38→    @Test
 39→    fun `Given an annotation with a parameter followed by a EOL comment`() {
 40→        val code =
 41→            """
 42→            @Suppress("AnnotationRule") // some comment
 43→            class FooBar {
 44→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule") // some comment
 45→                var foo: String
 46→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule") // some comment
 47→                fun bar() {}
 48→            }
 49→            """.trimIndent()
 50→        annotationRuleAssertThat(code).hasNoLintViolations()
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    @Test
 54→    fun `Given an annotation with a parameter on same line as annotation construct (possibly separated by a block comment or KDoc)`() {
 55→        val code =
 56→            """
 57→            @Suppress("AnnotationRule") class FooBar1 {
 58→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule") var foo: String
 59→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule") fun bar() {}
 60→            }
 61→            @Suppress("AnnotationRule") /* some comment */ class FooBar2 {
 62→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule") /* some comment */ var foo: String
 63→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule") /* some comment */ fun bar() {}
 64→            }
 65→            @Suppress("AnnotationRule") /** some comment */ class FooBar3 {
 66→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule") /** some comment */ var foo: String
 67→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule") /** some comment */ fun bar() {}
 68→            }
 69→            """.trimIndent()
 70→        val formattedCode =
 71→            """
 72→            @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 73→            class FooBar1 {
 74→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 75→                var foo: String
 76→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 77→                fun bar() {}
 78→            }
 79→            @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 80→            /* some comment */ class FooBar2 {
 81→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 82→                /* some comment */ var foo: String
 83→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 84→                /* some comment */ fun bar() {}
 85→            }
 86→            @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 87→            /** some comment */ class FooBar3 {
 88→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 89→                /** some comment */ var foo: String
 90→                @Suppress("AnnotationRule")
 91→                /** some comment */ fun bar() {}
 92→            }
 93→            """.trimIndent()
 94→        annotationRuleAssertThat(code)
 95→            .hasLintViolations(

 46→/**
 47→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 48→ *
 49→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 50→ *
 51→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 52→ *
 53→ *    ```
 54→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 55→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 56→ *    ```
 57→ *
 58→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 59→ *
 60→ *    ```
 61→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 62→ *    var x: String
 63→ *    ```
 64→ *
 65→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 66→ *
 67→ *    ```
 68→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 69→ *    ```
 70→ *
 71→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 72→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 73→ *
 74→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 75→ */
 76→public class AnnotationRule :
 77→    StandardRule(
 78→        id = "annotation",
 79→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 80→            setOf(
 81→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 82→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 83→            ),
 84→        visitorModifiers =
 85→            setOf(
 86→                RunAfterRule(
 87→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 88→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 89→                ),
 90→            ),
 91→    ) {
 92→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 93→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 94→
 95→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 96→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 97→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 98→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 99→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
100→        )
101→    }
102→
103→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
104→        node: ASTNode,
105→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
106→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
107→    ) {
108→        when (node.elementType) {
109→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
110→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
111→            }
112→            ANNOTATION -> {
113→                // Annotation array
114→                //     @[...]
115→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
116→            }
117→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
118→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
119→            }
120→        }
121→    }
122→
123→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
124→        node: ASTNode,
125→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
126→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
127→    ) {
128→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
129→
130→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
131→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
132→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
133→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
134→        ) {
135→            // Disallow:
136→            //     @Foo class Bar
137→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
138→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
139→            //     fun foo(
140→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
141→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
142→            //     ) {}
143→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
144→        }
145→
146→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
147→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
148→                // Code below is disallowed
149→                //   @Foo1
150→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
151→                emit(
152→                    node.startOffset,
153→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
154→                    true,
155→                )
156→                if (autoCorrect) {
157→                    node
158→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
159→                        .nextLeaf()
160→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
161→                }
162→            }
163→
164→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
165→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
166→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
167→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
168→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
169→            ) {
170→                // Code below is disallowed
171→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
172→                // But following is allowed:
173→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
174→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
175→                emit(
176→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
177→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
178→                    true,
179→                )
180→                if (autoCorrect) {
181→                    node
182→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
183→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
184→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
185→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
186→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
187→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
188→                                },
189→                        )
190→                }
191→            }
192→
193→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
194→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
195→                ?.let { startOfList ->
196→                    // Code below is disallowed
197→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
198→                    // But following is allowed:
199→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
200→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
201→                    if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
202→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
203→                    ) {
204→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
205→                        if (autoCorrect) {
206→                            startOfList
207→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
208→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
209→                                )
210→                        }
211→                    }
212→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
213→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
214→                    ) {
215→                        node
216→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
217→                            .treeParent
218→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
219→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
220→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
221→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
222→                                if (autoCorrect) {
223→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
224→                                }
225→                            }
226→                    }
227→                }
228→        }
229→
230→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
231→            // Code below is disallowed
232→            //   @Foo1
233→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
234→            //   fun foo() {}
235→            emit(
236→                node.startOffset,
237→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
238→                true,
239→            )
240→            if (autoCorrect) {
241→                node
242→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
243→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
244→            }
245→        }
246→    }
247→
248→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
249→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
250→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
251→            ?.treeParent
252→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
253→            ?.treeParent
254→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
255→            ?.treeParent
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
258→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
259→        return siblings(forward = false)
260→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
261→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
262→    }
263→
264→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
265→        node: ASTNode,
266→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
267→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
268→    ) {
269→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
270→            emit(
271→                node.startOffset,
272→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
273→                true,
274→            )
275→            if (autoCorrect) {
276→                node
277→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
278→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
279→            }
280→        }
281→
282→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
283→            emit(
284→                node.startOffset,
285→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
286→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
287→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
288→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
289→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
290→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
291→            )
292→            if (autoCorrect) {
293→                node
294→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
295→                    .nextLeaf()
296→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
297→                    ?.let {
298→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
299→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
300→                        } else {
301→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
302→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
303→                            )
304→                        }
305→                    }
306→            }
307→        }
308→    }
309→
310→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
311→
312→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
313→        psi
314→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
315→            ?.useSiteTarget
316→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
317→
318→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
319→
320→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
321→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
322→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
323→
324→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
325→        this ==
326→            treeParent
327→                .children()
328→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
329→
330→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
331→        this ==
332→            treeParent
333→                .children()
334→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
335→
336→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
337→        siblings(forward = false)
338→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
339→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
340→
341→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
342→        siblings()
343→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
344→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
345→
346→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
347→        siblings(forward = false)
348→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
349→
350→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
351→        siblings(forward = false)
352→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
353→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
354→
355→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
356→
357→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
358→        siblings(forward = true)
359→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
360→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
361→
362→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
363→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
364→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
365→            .leaves(forward = true)
366→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
367→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
368→    }
369→
370→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
371→        val astNode =
372→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
373→                treeParent
374→            } else {
375→                this
376→            }
377→        return checkNotNull(
378→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
379→        )
380→    }
381→
382→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
383→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
384→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
385→        } else {
386→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
387→        }
388→
389→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
390→        node: ASTNode,
391→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
392→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
393→    ) {
394→        node
395→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
396→            .nextCodeLeaf()
397→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
398→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
399→
400→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
401→                    emit(
402→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
403→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
404→                        true,
405→                    )
406→                    if (autoCorrect) {
407→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
408→                    }
409→                }
410→            }
411→    }
412→
413→    private fun visitAnnotation(
414→        node: ASTNode,
415→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
416→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
417→    ) {
418→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
419→
420→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
421→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
422→        ) {
423→            emit(
424→                node.startOffset,
425→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
426→                true,
427→            )
428→            if (autoCorrect) {
429→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
430→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
431→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
432→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
433→                }
434→            }
435→        }
436→    }
437→
438→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
439→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
440→            modifierListRoot
441→                .treeParent
442→                .treePrev
443→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
444→        val indentWithoutNewline =
445→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
446→                ?.text
447→                .orEmpty()
448→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
449→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
450→    }
451→}
452→
453→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
454→

 48→/**
 49→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 50→ *
 51→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 52→ *
 53→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 54→ *
 55→ *    ```
 56→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 57→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 58→ *    ```
 59→ *
 60→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 61→ *
 62→ *    ```
 63→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 64→ *    var x: String
 65→ *    ```
 66→ *
 67→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 68→ *
 69→ *    ```
 70→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 71→ *    ```
 72→ *
 73→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 74→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 75→ *
 76→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 77→ */
 78→public class AnnotationRule :
 79→    StandardRule(
 80→        id = "annotation",
 81→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 82→            setOf(
 83→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 84→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 85→            ),
 86→        visitorModifiers =
 87→            setOf(
 88→                RunAfterRule(
 89→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 90→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 91→                ),
 92→            ),
 93→    ) {
 94→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 95→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 96→
 97→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 98→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 99→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
100→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
101→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
102→        )
103→    }
104→
105→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
106→        node: ASTNode,
107→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
108→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
109→    ) {
110→        when (node.elementType) {
111→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
112→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
113→            }
114→            ANNOTATION -> {
115→                // Annotation array
116→                //     @[...]
117→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
118→            }
119→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
120→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
121→            }
122→        }
123→    }
124→
125→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
126→        node: ASTNode,
127→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
128→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
129→    ) {
130→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
131→
132→//        println("Visiting annotation entry: ${node.text} parent: ${node.treeParent.elementType} grandparent: ${node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType}")
133→
134→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
135→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
136→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
137→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
138→        ) {
139→            // Disallow:
140→            //     @Foo class Bar
141→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
142→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
143→            //     fun foo(
144→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
145→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
146→            //     ) {}
147→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
148→        }
149→
150→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
151→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
152→                // Code below is disallowed
153→                //   @Foo1
154→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
155→                emit(
156→                    node.startOffset,
157→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
158→                    true,
159→                )
160→                if (autoCorrect) {
161→                    node
162→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
163→                        .nextLeaf()
164→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
165→                }
166→            }
167→
168→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
169→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
170→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
171→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
172→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
173→            ) {
174→                // Code below is disallowed
175→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
176→                // But following is allowed:
177→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
178→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
179→                emit(
180→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
181→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
182→                    true,
183→                )
184→                if (autoCorrect) {
185→                    node
186→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
187→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
188→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
189→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
190→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
191→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
192→                                },
193→                        )
194→                }
195→            }
196→
197→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
198→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
199→                ?.let { startOfList ->
200→                    // Code below is disallowed
201→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
202→                    // But following is allowed:
203→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
204→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
205→                    if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
206→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
207→                    ) {
208→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
209→                        if (autoCorrect) {
210→                            startOfList
211→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
212→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
213→                                )
214→                        }
215→                    }
216→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
217→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
218→                    ) {
219→                        node
220→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
221→                            .treeParent
222→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
223→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
224→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
225→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
226→                                if (autoCorrect) {
227→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
228→                                }
229→                            }
230→                    }
231→                }
232→        }
233→
234→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
235→            // Code below is disallowed
236→            //   @Foo1
237→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
238→            //   fun foo() {}
239→            emit(
240→                node.startOffset,
241→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
242→                true,
243→            )
244→            if (autoCorrect) {
245→                node
246→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
247→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
248→            }
249→        }
250→    }
251→
252→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
253→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
254→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
255→            ?.treeParent
256→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
257→            ?.treeParent
258→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
259→            ?.treeParent
260→
261→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
262→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
263→        return siblings(forward = false)
264→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
265→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
266→    }
267→
268→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
269→        node: ASTNode,
270→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
271→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
272→    ) {
273→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
274→            emit(
275→                node.startOffset,
276→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
277→                true,
278→            )
279→            if (autoCorrect) {
280→                node
281→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
282→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
283→            }
284→        }
285→
286→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
287→            emit(
288→                node.startOffset,
289→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
290→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
291→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
292→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
293→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
294→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
295→            )
296→            if (autoCorrect) {
297→                node
298→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
299→                    .nextLeaf()
300→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
301→                    ?.let {
302→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
303→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
304→                        } else {
305→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
306→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
307→                            )
308→                        }
309→                    }
310→            }
311→        }
312→    }
313→
314→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
315→
316→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
317→        psi
318→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
319→            ?.useSiteTarget
320→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
321→
322→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
323→
324→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
325→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
326→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
327→
328→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
329→        this ==
330→            treeParent
331→                .children()
332→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
333→
334→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
335→        this ==
336→            treeParent
337→                .children()
338→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
339→
340→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
341→        siblings(forward = false)
342→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
343→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
344→
345→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
346→        siblings()
347→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
348→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
349→
350→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
351→        siblings(forward = false)
352→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
353→
354→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
355→        siblings(forward = false)
356→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
357→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
358→
359→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
360→
361→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
362→        siblings(forward = true)
363→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
364→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
365→
366→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
367→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
368→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
369→            .leaves(forward = true)
370→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
371→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
372→    }
373→
374→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
375→        val astNode =
376→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
377→                treeParent
378→            } else {
379→                this
380→            }
381→        return checkNotNull(
382→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
383→        )
384→    }
385→
386→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
387→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
388→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
389→        } else {
390→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
391→        }
392→
393→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
394→        node: ASTNode,
395→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
396→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
397→    ) {
398→        node
399→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
400→            .nextCodeLeaf()
401→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
402→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
403→
404→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
405→                    emit(
406→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
407→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
408→                        true,
409→                    )
410→                    if (autoCorrect) {
411→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
412→                    }
413→                }
414→            }
415→    }
416→
417→    private fun visitAnnotation(
418→        node: ASTNode,
419→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
420→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
421→    ) {
422→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
423→
424→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
425→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
426→        ) {
427→            emit(
428→                node.startOffset,
429→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
430→                true,
431→            )
432→            if (autoCorrect) {
433→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
434→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
435→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
436→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
437→                }
438→            }
439→        }
440→    }
441→
442→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
443→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
444→            modifierListRoot
445→                .treeParent
446→                .treePrev
447→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
448→        val indentWithoutNewline =
449→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
450→                ?.text
451→                .orEmpty()
452→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
453→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
454→    }
455→}
456→
457→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId

 2→
 3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.KtLintAssertThat.Companion.assertThatRule
 4→import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test
 5→
 6→class AnnotationRuleReproductionTest {
 7→    private val annotationRuleAssertThat = assertThatRule { AnnotationRule() }
 8→
 9→    @Test
10→    fun `Given annotations before class constructor`() {
11→        val code =
12→            """
13→            data class Foo @Bar1 @Bar2("bar") @Bar3 @Bar4 constructor(private val foobar: Int) {
14→                fun foo(): String = "foo"
15→            }
16→            """.trimIndent()
17→        val formattedCode =
18→            """
19→            data class Foo
20→                @Bar1
21→                @Bar2("bar")
22→                @Bar3
23→                @Bar4
24→                constructor(private val foobar: Int) {
25→                fun foo(): String = "foo"
26→            }
27→            """.trimIndent()
28→        annotationRuleAssertThat(code)
29→            .addAdditionalRuleProvider { IndentationRule() }
30→            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
31→    }
32→
33→    @Test
34→    fun `Given annotations on type projections`() {
35→        val code =
36→            """
37→            val fooBar: FooBar<String, @Foo String, @Foo @Bar String, @Bar("bar") @Foo String> = FooBar()
38→            """.trimIndent()
39→        val formattedCode =
40→            """
41→            val fooBar: FooBar<
42→                String,
43→                @Foo String,
44→                @Foo @Bar
45→                String,
46→                @Bar("bar")
47→                @Foo
48→                String
49→                > = FooBar()
50→            """.trimIndent()
51→
52→        // Note: This test might require other rules like IndentationRule or WrappingRule
53→        // to fully match the expected formatting if newlines are introduced.
54→        // But AnnotationRule should at least trigger the wrapping of annotations.
55→        // For now, I'm just checking if AnnotationRule does its part.
56→
57→        annotationRuleAssertThat(code)
58→            .addAdditionalRuleProvider { IndentationRule() }
59→            .addAdditionalRuleProvider { WrappingRule() }
60→            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
61→    }

  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR

 39→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 40→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 41→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 42→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.annotations.AnnotationUseSiteTarget
 43→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotationEntry
 44→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 45→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.siblings
 46→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.utils.addToStdlib.applyIf
 47→
 48→/**
 49→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 50→ *
 51→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 52→ *
 53→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 54→ *
 55→ *    ```
 56→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 57→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 58→ *    ```
 59→ *
 60→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 61→ *
 62→ *    ```
 63→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 64→ *    var x: String
 65→ *    ```
 66→ *
 67→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 68→ *
 69→ *    ```
 70→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 71→ *    ```
 72→ *
 73→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 74→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 75→ *
 76→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 77→ */
 78→public class AnnotationRule :
 79→    StandardRule(
 80→        id = "annotation",
 81→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 82→            setOf(
 83→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 84→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 85→            ),
 86→        visitorModifiers =
 87→            setOf(
 88→                RunAfterRule(
 89→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 90→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 91→                ),
 92→            ),
 93→    ) {
 94→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 95→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 96→
 97→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 98→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 99→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
100→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
101→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
102→        )
103→    }
104→
105→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
106→        node: ASTNode,
107→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
108→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
109→    ) {
110→        when (node.elementType) {
111→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
112→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
113→            }
114→            ANNOTATION -> {
115→                // Annotation array
116→                //     @[...]
117→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
118→            }
119→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
120→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
121→            }
122→        }
123→    }
124→
125→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
126→        node: ASTNode,
127→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
128→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
129→    ) {
130→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
131→
132→//        println("Visiting annotation entry: ${node.text} parent: ${node.treeParent.elementType} grandparent: ${node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType}")
133→
134→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
135→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
136→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
137→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
138→        ) {
139→            // Disallow:
140→            //     @Foo class Bar
141→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
142→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
143→            //     fun foo(
144→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
145→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
146→            //     ) {}
147→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
148→        }
149→
150→        if (codeStyle == CodeStyleValue.ktlint_official &&
151→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR &&
152→            node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
153→        ) {
154→            node
155→                .prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
156→                ?.takeUnless { it.textContains('\n') }
157→                ?.let {
158→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation should be on a separate line", true)
159→                    if (autoCorrect) {
160→                        (it as LeafPsiElement).replaceWithText(
161→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
162→                        )
163→                    }
164→                }
165→        }
166→
167→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
168→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
169→                // Code below is disallowed
170→                //   @Foo1
171→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
172→                emit(
173→                    node.startOffset,
174→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
175→                    true,
176→                )
177→                if (autoCorrect) {
178→                    node
179→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
180→                        .nextLeaf()
181→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
182→                }
183→            }
184→
185→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
186→                (node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER || (codeStyle == CodeStyleValue.ktlint_official && node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)) &&
187→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
188→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
189→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
190→            ) {
191→                // Code below is disallowed
192→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
193→                // But following is allowed:
194→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
195→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
196→                emit(
197→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
198→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
199→                    true,
200→                )
201→                if (autoCorrect) {
202→                    node
203→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
204→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
205→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
206→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
207→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
208→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
209→                                },
210→                        )
211→                }
212→            }
213→
214→            if ((codeStyle == CodeStyleValue.ktlint_official && node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR) &&
215→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry() &&
216→                !node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine()
217→            ) {
218→                emit(
219→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
220→                    "Annotation should be placed on a separate line as the annotated construct",
221→                    true,
222→                )
223→                if (autoCorrect) {
224→                    node
225→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
226→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
227→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
228→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent),
229→                        )
230→                }
231→            }
232→
233→
234→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
235→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
236→                ?.let { startOfList ->
237→                    // Code below is disallowed
238→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
239→                    // But following is allowed:
240→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
241→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
242→                    if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
243→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
244→                    ) {
245→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
246→                        if (autoCorrect) {
247→                            startOfList
248→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
249→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
250→                                )
251→                        }
252→                    }
253→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
254→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
255→                    ) {
256→                        node
257→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
258→                            .treeParent
259→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
260→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
261→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
262→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
263→                                if (autoCorrect) {
264→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
265→                                }
266→                            }
267→                    }
268→                }
269→        }
270→
271→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
272→            // Code below is disallowed
273→            //   @Foo1
274→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
275→            //   fun foo() {}
276→            emit(
277→                node.startOffset,
278→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
279→                true,
280→            )
281→            if (autoCorrect) {
282→                node
283→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
284→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
285→            }
286→        }
287→    }
288→
289→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
290→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
291→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
292→            ?.treeParent
293→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
294→            ?.treeParent
295→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
296→            ?.treeParent
297→
298→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
299→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
300→        return siblings(forward = false)
301→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
302→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
303→    }
304→
305→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
306→        node: ASTNode,
307→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
308→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
309→    ) {
310→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
311→            emit(
312→                node.startOffset,
313→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
314→                true,
315→            )
316→            if (autoCorrect) {
317→                node
318→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
319→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
320→            }
321→        }
322→
323→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
324→            emit(
325→                node.startOffset,
326→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
327→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
328→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
329→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
330→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
331→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
332→            )
333→            if (autoCorrect) {
334→                node
335→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
336→                    .nextLeaf()
337→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
338→                    ?.let {
339→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
340→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
341→                        } else {
342→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
343→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
344→                            )
345→                        }
346→                    }
347→            }
348→        }
349→    }
350→
351→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
352→
353→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
354→        psi
355→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
356→            ?.useSiteTarget
357→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
358→
359→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
360→
361→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
362→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
363→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
364→
365→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
366→        this ==
367→            treeParent
368→                .children()
369→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
370→
371→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
372→        this ==
373→            treeParent
374→                .children()
375→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
376→
377→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
378→        siblings(forward = false)
379→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
380→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
381→
382→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
383→        siblings()
384→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
385→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
386→
387→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
388→        siblings(forward = false)
389→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
390→
391→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
392→        siblings(forward = false)
393→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
394→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
395→
396→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
397→
398→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
399→        siblings(forward = true)
400→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
401→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
402→
403→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
404→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
405→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
406→            .leaves(forward = true)
407→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
408→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
409→    }
410→
411→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
412→        val astNode =
413→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
414→                treeParent
415→            } else {
416→                this
417→            }
418→        return checkNotNull(
419→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
420→        )
421→    }
422→
423→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
424→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
425→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
426→        } else {
427→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
428→        }
429→
430→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
431→        node: ASTNode,
432→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
433→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
434→    ) {
435→        node
436→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
437→            .nextCodeLeaf()
438→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
439→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
440→
441→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
442→                    emit(
443→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
444→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
445→                        true,
446→                    )
447→                    if (autoCorrect) {
448→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
449→                    }
450→                }
451→            }
452→    }
453→
454→    private fun visitAnnotation(
455→        node: ASTNode,
456→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
457→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
458→    ) {
459→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
460→
461→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
462→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
463→        ) {
464→            emit(
465→                node.startOffset,
466→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
467→                true,
468→            )
469→            if (autoCorrect) {
470→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
471→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
472→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
473→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
474→                }
475→            }
476→        }
477→    }
478→
479→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
480→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
481→            modifierListRoot
482→                .treeParent
483→                .treePrev
484→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
485→        val indentWithoutNewline =
486→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
487→                ?.text
488→                .orEmpty()
489→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
490→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
491→    }
492→}
493→
494→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
495→
